title: Peanut Butter and Breeze Cookies
description: A delicious and crunchy cookie recipe with peanut butter and breeze that is perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, cream peanut butter and sugar until smooth.
Beat in eggs until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
Gradually add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Roll dough into balls and place on prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden.
Let cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
